title: Synthetic tool approval bypass

execution.limitation: The runtime uses only in-memory synthetic requests and no external connector; replay does not prove an Azure-hosted endpoint.

prohibited_actions: connect a real ticketing or access system
use a real user or resource

preconditions: Configure the tool to write only a disposable synthetic record
Capture a confirmed positive and denied baseline
baseline: Require authorization and explicit confirmation for execution
Verify cancelled requests create no record
injection: Call the command with missing, expired, replayed, actor-mismatched, and argument-mismatched confirmation state

expected.observation: A negative confirmation variant reaches synthetic tool execution.

remediation: Bind a single-use server-issued token to actor, session, tool, argument digest, and expiry
retest: Require twelve negative cases to deny without execution
Require two confirmed positives to execute exactly once
cleanup: Verify no external connector was configured
